functions.name: classifyPosting
functions.description: From the posting title, candidate skills return the initial id, single best 4-digit ESCO occupation and title in English language. Both code and title MUST be the official English version.

messages.content: 1) Use title and the provided skills or description (if skills missing). 2) Select the single best 4-digit ESCO occupation code & ESCO title in English language. 3) Return a JSON object that matches the classifyPosting schema.

functions.description: From the posting title, candidate skills return the initial id, single best 4-digit ESCO occupation and title in English language. Both code and title MUST be the official English version.

messages.content: 1) Use title and the provided skills or description (if skills missing). 2) Select the single best 4-digit ESCO occupation code & ESCO title in English language. 3) Return a JSON object that matches the classifyPosting schema.

functions.description: From the posting title, candidate skills return the initial id, single best 4-digit ESCO occupation and title in English language. Both code and title MUST be the official English version.

messages.content: 1) Use title and the provided skills or description (if skills missing). 2) Select the single best 4-digit ESCO occupation code & ESCO title in English language. 3) Return a JSON object that matches the classifyPosting schema.
